name: PScharts
description: PScharts 1.0 — Chart your USPSA match scores from PractiScore

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src https://practiscore.com https://s3.amazonaws.com https://api.github.com https://uspsa.org https://objects.githubusercontent.com
